sections.paragraph: <entryFree id="n113747" key="xellhstuarxe/w" type="main" opt="n" TEIform="entryFree"> <orth extent="suff" lang="greek" opt="n" TEIform="orth">χελληστυαρχ-έω</orth>, <sense id="n113747.0" n="A" level="1" opt="n" TEIform="sense"> <tr_ opt="n" TEIform="tr">hold such office,</tr_> ib.<bibl default="NO" TEIform="bibl"> <biblScope TEIform="biblScope">515</biblScope> </bibl> (ibid.).</sense> </entryFree>
